_note: Orchestrator-maintained. Synthesized by analyzing specialist priorities from engineering-status.json and design-status.json. Update when specialist priorities change or on weekly review. Rows with source "design" are execution-owned by the design agent (see design-status.json); "eng" by engineering. Cross-cutting items may split work across both charters.

priorities.title: Room Editor Sprint 1: inspector rebuild + mode clarity (cursor, rail, overlay)
priorities.note: Cross-agent P1 — Eng: inspector panel + entity type system; Design: place-vs-select mode errors corrupt layouts. Must land together.

priorities.title: Export schema: version field + validation layer before next schema-touching feature
priorities.note: Unversioned exports are a silent breaking-change risk. Founder decision required: greenlight before any further schema work.

priorities.title: Sprite Workbench: AI pipeline integration (Pixellab) — frontend generation flow
priorities.note: Backend connected; frontend flow in progress. Core differentiator for the workbench value prop.

priorities.title: STYLE_GUIDE: motion + Copilot UI patterns — add to agent prompt references
priorities.note: Prevents LLM-default transitions and generic AI UI from shipping in new PRs. Low effort, high leverage.

priorities.title: WCAG 2.2 AA + keyboard order on new inspector and modal flows
priorities.note: Focus trap, :focus-visible, 44px targets. Linked to Room Editor sprint — review accessibility as inspector lands.

priorities.title: AI Copilot: Gemini 2.5 spatial reasoning evaluation (trigger decision)
priorities.note: Founder decision needed: define the trigger criteria for starting the Gemini 2.5 evaluation.

risks_p1.title: Export schema has no version field
risks_p1.note: Any schema change will silently break game runtime. Versioning is P1 before next schema-touching feature.

founder_decisions.title: Export schema versioning — greenlight before next schema-touching feature
founder_decisions.note: Blocks: room editor entity type additions, any future schema evolution.

founder_decisions.title: Gemini vs. Claude for room Copilot — define evaluation trigger criteria
founder_decisions.note: When should the team start the Gemini 2.5 spatial benchmarks? Time-boxed evaluation needed.
